name: securevault-merged
description: Secure Data Exchange — Merged Capstone (RSA+AES+TLS+JWT+File Upload)

scripts.gen-certs: mkdir -p backend\certs && cd backend\certs && openssl genrsa -out server.key 2048 && openssl req -new -key server.key -out server.csr -subj "/CN=localhost" && openssl x509 -req -days 365 -in server.csr -signkey server.key -out server.crt && cd ..\..
